bonuses.leadin: Constructivist art inspired the sharply angular overhang of this museum’s concrete facade. For 10 points each:
parts: Name this parametricist museum built on top of a former military barracks. This museum’s stark white interior contrasts with its weaving and underlit black staircases, which lie below a ceiling of flowing concrete beams and louvered skylights.
This architect’s subterranean Chichu Art Museum lets in light through concrete-reinforced geometric openings, a technique he also used in his Church of the Light.

Lina Bo Bardi designed an art museum in this country without interior walls that displays painting on crystal easels throughout its open plan. Oscar Niemeyer designed many buildings in this country's planned capital.
answers: MAXXI [accept Museo nazionale delle arti del XXI secolo; accept Italy’s National Museum of 21st Century Arts; prompt on National Museum of 21st Century Arts] (by Zaha Hadid)
answers_sanitized: MAXXI [accept Museo nazionale delle arti del XXI secolo; accept Italy's National Museum of 21st Century Arts; prompt on National Museum of 21st Century Arts] (by Zaha Hadid)
